items.prompt: In a classic Verilog testbench, stimulus inputs driven in initial are usually…
choices: reg (or logic) variables in the TB
wire nets driven by the DUT
items.explain: The TB assigns stimulus; reg/logic is the usual classic pattern.

items.prompt: The DUT output net observed by the TB is typically…
choices: A wire (or logic) driven by the DUT
A reg the TB assigns in initial
items.explain: Outputs are nets the design drives; the TB reads them.

items.prompt: The initial block in a classic TB mainly…
choices: Applies stimulus over time, prints, and finishes the run
Replaces the need for a DUT instance
Is only used in UVM run_phase
items.explain: initial holds procedural stimulus, display, and finish.

items.prompt: Driving a wire that the DUT also drives is good practice.
items.explain: Two drivers on one net cause contention; observe DUT outputs, don't drive them.
